questionHtml: State why the cost for installing the cable between A and F would be higher than between the other buildings.
markschemeHtml:
any reasonable statement referring to the lake         R1

(eg. there is a lake between A and F, the cables would need to be installed under/over/around the lake, special waterproof cables are needed for lake, etc.)

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: State why the cost for installing the cable between A and F would be higher than between the other buildings.
